arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Man Utd outcast Antony completes January transfer
arts.sum: Two-and-a-half years on from his arrival, the Brazilian leaves as one of the biggest flop signings in Man Utd - and indeed Premier League - history. The following campaign, it took him until April to score his first Premier League goal and he only found the back of the net three times in 38 appearances.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs. Man United: Red Devils handed triple injury boost for Premier League showdown
arts.sum: Manchester United are handed a triple injury boost for Sunday's Premier League clash against Fulham, with Matthijs de Ligt, Leny Yoro and Noussair Mazraoui included in the squad.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Man Utd confirm Antony exit with 'unique transfer clause' included in deal
arts.sum: Brazilian winger Antony has been an unmitigated disaster at Manchester United since a mega-money move from Ajax and he has already been shown the exit door at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: “We are not holding back” – Dof publically names Manchester United man as target, but won’t pay ‘outside the market’ figure
arts.sum: Napoli director of football Giovanni Manna has confirmed that Manchester United’s Alejandro Garnacho is a transfer target this month. Gianluca di Marzio provides comments from the Napoli chief today in which he confirms the Manchester United winger is on his list. Reports throughout this month have put Napoli at the front of the queue for The post “We are not holding back” – Dof publically names Manchester United man as target, but won’t pay ‘outside the market’ figure appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'A fresh start for one of the worst signings in Man Utd history'
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Antony arrived in the summer of 2022 full of promise but he is now on the brink of leaving the club as one of their worst ever signings.

arts.ttl: Where Man United would be without pantomime villain Bruno Fernandes... and what makes Ruben Amorim's unique captain so important - THE SHARPE END
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: It's fair to say that, sometimes, Bruno Fernandes doesn't help himself. A misplaced pass from a team-mate and up go the arms and out comes the sigh.

arts.ttl: Manchester United get major triple squad boost ahead of Fulham trip
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim is set to be able to call upon a crop of key defenders for the clash at Craven Cottage.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Manchester United Predictions and Betting Tips for Premier League Game
arts.sum: This article will contain the best tips and predictions on the Fulham vs Manchester United fixture in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Paul Merson delivers brutal Alejandro Garnacho Man United transfer swap verdict
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United transfer news - with a fresh verdict on a proposed swap deal involving Alejandro Garnacho and Chelsea star Christopher Nkunku.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's youngest ever player Gaskell dies aged 84
arts.sum: David Gaskell, who holds the record of being Manchester United's youngest ever player, has died at the age of 84.
